positive: A stylized, minimalist portrait of a majestic silver fox curled around a stack of open books, rendered in a clean, whimsical silhouette style. The fox's fur should have deep, saturated gradients of icy blue and midnight teal, contrasting sharply against a solid, warm cream background. The composition must be perfectly centered and scalable for fabric printing, utilizing negative space strategically. Include subtle, elegant line art details within the books to suggest knowledge and mystery. High contrast, graphic design aesthetic, vector art quality, pop art colors, perfect composition, no photorealism.
negative: photorealism, blurred, grainy, noisy, artifact, ugly, messy, text, signature, watermark, logos, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low quality, poor composition, messy background
